reviews.text:
If you're in search of a cocktail bar that checks all the boxes for an unforgettable night out, look no further than Maison Balkii. This gem of a spot has everything you could want: incredible cocktails, delicious bar bites, impeccable service, and a perfectly curated atmosphere.

First and foremost, the cocktails are nothing short of amazing. The menu boasts a creative array of drinks that range from classic favorites to innovative new concoctions, each one crafted with precision and flair. The mixologists here are true artists; they don't just make drinks—they create experiences in a glass. Whether you're in the mood for something bold and smoky or light and refreshing, there's a drink on the menu that will hit the spot. And if you're feeling adventurous, the staff is more than happy to whip up something special based on your preferences.

To complement the drinks, the bar bites are equally impressive. The food menu may be small, but every item is thoughtfully selected and prepared to perfection. Each dish pairs perfectly with the cocktails, making it easy to settle in and stay for hours.

What really sets Maison Balkii apart, however, is the service. The staff here go above and beyond to ensure every guest feels welcomed and well taken care of. They are knowledgeable, attentive, and clearly passionate about what they do. It's rare to find a place where the service feels so effortlessly warm and genuine, making it easy to relax and enjoy the evening.

Finally, the atmosphere is spot on. The ambiance strikes the perfect balance between lively and intimate, making it a great spot for both date nights and gatherings with friends.

Overall, Maison Balkii is a must-visit for anyone who appreciates top-notch cocktails, great food, and exceptional service in an inviting setting. This bar has quickly become a favorite, and after just one visit, it will likely be yours too.

reviews.text:
Bar Les Frangins is a hidden gem for gin enthusiasts looking for a simple, yet satisfying experience. As soon as you step in, you'll be greeted by a warm and cozy atmosphere that immediately sets the tone for a memorable evening. The attention to detail in this bar is truly commendable, from the carefully crafted cocktails to the intimate decor.

Speaking of cocktails, the gin-based creations at Bar Les Frangins are simply outstanding. Each drink is expertly mixed with precision, ensuring that every sip delivers the perfect balance of flavors. Whether you prefer a classic gin and tonic or a more adventurous concoction, their menu has something for everyone's taste.

What sets Bar Les Frangins apart is their dedication to quality ingredients. From the selection of premium gins to the carefully chosen mixers and garnishes, every element is thoughtfully curated to elevate your drinking experience. You can expect nothing but the best when it comes to the ingredients used in their cocktails.

The bartenders at Bar Les Frangins are not only skilled mixologists but also friendly and knowledgeable. They take the time to listen to your preferences and suggest cocktails that suit your taste buds. Their expertise and passion for gin shine through in every drink they create, making your visit truly personalized and enjoyable.

The ambiance of the bar is cozy and inviting, making it the perfect spot for a relaxed evening with friends or a romantic date night. The dim lighting, comfortable seating, and soothing background music create an intimate setting that allows you to unwind and savor your drink.

In summary, Bar Les Frangins is a hidden gem that caters to gin lovers seeking a cozy and memorable cocktail experience. With its attention to detail, delicious cocktails, and friendly staff, it's a must-visit for anyone looking to indulge in the world of gin. I highly recommend paying a visit to this bar and immersing yourself in the delightful ambiance. You won't be disappointed!

I recommend it 100% and I'll definitely be back!

Nous avons aussi goûté les pizzas : très bonnes, avec une pâte fine et croustillante 👌

reviews.textTranslated: This bar is absolutely fantastic for several reasons. The owner, Elias, is incredibly welcoming and constantly strives to improve his establishment, although we wish it were bigger to accommodate its many regulars. From early morning coffee (breakfast at a very attractive price) to late evening drinks with friends, there's something for everyone. In the summer, a covered outdoor terrace allows you to enjoy the good weather. As for the food, all the dishes are homemade. The chef tantalizes the taste buds, always at very reasonable prices. On weekends, the café transforms into a karaoke haven. People sing, they dance, all without any inhibitions. And the atmosphere is electric.
reviews.text:
Ce bar est génialissime pour plusieurs raisons. Le patron Elias est super accueillant, essaie de sans cesse améliorer son établissement, même si on aimerait que cela soit plus grand pour contenir les nombreux adeptes.
En plus du café du matin très tôt (petit déjeuner à prix très attractif) à tard le soir pour siroter un verre entre amis, on y trouve son bonheur. L'été, une terrasse couverte extérieure permet de profiter du bon temps.
Côté restauration, tous les plats proposés sont faits maison. Le cuisiner éveille les papilles, toujours dans des prix ultra correctes.
En fin de semaine, le café se transforme en temple du karaoké. On y chante, on y danse, le tout sans complexe. Et l'ambiance est caliente.
reviews.name: Carmelo Fotia

Bienvenue au Café Balzac ! ✨

Entièrement rénové et porté par une nouvelle équipe passionnée, le Balzac vous accueille tous les jours dans un cadre chaleureux. Que ce soit pour un café matinal, un cocktail entre amis ou une bière fraîche, notre carte saura vous combler.

Profitez de notre belle terrasse ensoleillée ou de notre salle cosy. Pour les petites faims, laissez-vous tenter par nos pizzas artisanales et nos snacks.

Ne partez pas sans avoir goûté nos célèbres pâtisseries maison ! Cakes divers et gâteau aux poires sont nos spécialités. 

Avis aux supporters ! Nous transmettons les plus grands événements sportifs, notamment la Ligue des Champions, sur nos écrans. 

On a hâte de vous rencontrer !

reviews.text:
Cafe Du Rond Point, what an incredible experiance. I had been in Geneva for a week and finally made it to this fantastic location.

From the second I walked in the door, I was greeted with a smile and hello. The aroma of the food was most inviting. We were seated, and when they realized that we were Americans, they gave us the most lovely waitress who happened to be from Boston, MA. That alone was enough to make me feel welcome.

The restuarant was packed and yet our server was on top of us at all times. She was able to manage all the tables she had and ours on top of it. I asked several questions about the wine and beer options and she gave me detailed and distinct descriptions. Since her recommendation for the wine was so on point, I asked for her recommendation of food. Again she hit it out of the park! We had the most amazing pot of deliciousness. It was baked and steamed sauerkraut with sausage, bacon, pork tail, and potatoes. I ate like it was going to be my last meal! It was one of the best dishes I have ever had. I only wish I would have found this place on day one.

The view is impeccable, its almost all windows so you can see all of the beauty geneva has to offer.

If you want to get a true Genevan experiance with genuine happy locals and great service. Well you must stop at Cafe Du Rond Point. The food with its magnificent flavors will knock you off your feet. Their knowledge of their product will help you ease into the right choice for you. You will NOT regret your meal at "Cafe Du Rond Point" !

reviews.text:
I recently stopped for lunch at Bar Restaurant Pizzeria Lounge Luna, and it turned out to be a genuinely enjoyable and relaxing experience. From the moment we arrived, the atmosphere felt welcoming and unpretentious, making it an easy place to settle in and take a proper break.
The menu is varied and well thought out, with a good balance between classic dishes and lighter options. I chose a salad made with fresh, crisp green vegetables, cheese, and cured pork. It was exceptionally well prepared: the vegetables were truly fresh and crunchy, the flavours were well balanced, and the cured pork added a rich, savoury depth without overpowering the dish. Everything tasted carefully selected and of very good quality. The portion was also generous, leaving me comfortably full, which is always appreciated. It felt less like a simple salad and more like a refined dish — almost a small delicacy — and it has been a long time since I enjoyed something so satisfying yet light.
The staff deserve special mention. They were polite, attentive, and genuinely helpful without being intrusive. Service was smooth and well timed, and we felt looked after throughout the meal. This added greatly to the overall sense of ease and comfort.
The setting itself is pleasant and relaxed, making it suitable both for a calm lunch and for taking time to unwind. We enjoyed our meal, rested well, and left feeling refreshed.
Overall, the food quality, generous portions, friendly service, and comfortable atmosphere combined to create a very positive experience. I would happily return and would recommend this place to anyone looking for a tasty, well-prepared meal in a welcoming environment in Geneva.

reviews.textTranslated:
C.A.V Wine Shop in Geneva: A Treasure for Wine Lovers!

If you're looking for an exceptional wine experience in Geneva, look no further than C.A.V Wine Shop. This little gem is a treasure trove where you'll find wines to suit every taste and budget. Whether you're a seasoned connoisseur or a curious novice, you'll be delighted by the selection.

What truly sets C.A.V Wine Shop apart is the expert advice of the owner, Charles-Henri. His passion for wine is contagious, and he goes above and beyond to ensure your satisfaction. Thanks to his extensive knowledge and expertise, he'll guide you toward the choices that best match your preferences.

And there's good news for wine lovers starting December 1, 2023: C.A.V Cave À Vin is now also a wine bar, where you can enjoy a diverse selection of wines to suit all budgets. It's the perfect place to spend quality time with friends, discovering new flavors and sharing convivial moments.

To accompany your tasting, you can enjoy platters of high-quality charcuterie and cheeses, carefully selected to complement the aromas and flavors of the wines. Furthermore, Charles-Henri likes to surprise his customers with small culinary discoveries, adding a touch of originality to your experience.

In short, C.A.V Cave À Vin is a true gem for wine lovers in Geneva. With its varied wine selection, expert advice, friendly atmosphere, and delicious food options, this place is sure to win you over. Visit the C.A.V Wine Cellar and let Charles-Henri introduce you to a world of oenological pleasures.
reviews.text:
C.A.V Cave À Vin à Genève : Un trésor pour les amateurs de vin !

Si vous êtes à la recherche d'une expérience vinicole exceptionnelle à Genève, ne cherchez pas plus loin que la C.A.V Cave À Vin. Cet endroit est un petit écrin où vous trouverez des pépites pour tous les goûts et budgets. Que vous soyez un connaisseur chevronné ou un amateur curieux, vous serez comblé par la sélection de vins proposée.

Ce qui distingue vraiment la C.A.V Cave À Vin, ce sont les conseils avisés du maître des lieux, Charles-Henri. Sa passion pour le vin est contagieuse, et il met tout en œuvre pour vous faire plaisir. Grâce à sa connaissance approfondie et à son expertise, il saura vous guider vers les choix qui correspondent le mieux à vos préférences.

Et il y a de bonnes nouvelles pour les amateurs de vin à partir du 1er décembre 2023 : la C.A.V Cave À Vin est désormais également un bar à vin, où vous pourrez déguster sur place une sélection variée de vins adaptés à tous les budgets. C'est l'endroit idéal pour passer du bon temps entre amis, en découvrant de nouvelles saveurs et en partageant des moments conviviaux.

Pour accompagner votre dégustation, vous pourrez profiter de planchettes de charcuterie et fromages de grande qualité, soigneusement sélectionnées pour compléter les arômes et les saveurs des vins. De plus, Charles-Henri aime surprendre ses clients avec de petites découvertes culinaires, ajoutant ainsi une touche d'originalité à votre expérience.

En résumé, la C.A.V Cave À Vin est un véritable joyau pour les amateurs de vin à Genève. Avec sa sélection de vins variée, ses conseils experts, son atmosphère conviviale et ses délicieuses options de restauration, cet endroit ne manquera pas de vous séduire. Rendez-vous à la C.A.V Cave À Vin et laissez Charles-Henri vous faire découvrir un monde de plaisirs œnologiques.

Excellent experience! The lady was very kind and welcoming. The food was very good!

But the dish called Yassa (chicken) was excellent!

4.5/5
reviews.text:
Excellente experience! La dame était très gentille et accueillante. La nourriture très bonne!

Franchement je metttrai une note parfaite! La seule raison que j'ai légèrement enlevé un point c'est qu'il y avait des plats sur le menu qui n'était pas disponible.

Mais le plat qui s'appelle Yassa (poulet) était excellent!

4.5/5
reviews.responseFromOwnerText:
Thank you so much for your wonderful feedback!

We are delighted that you enjoyed the service and the quality of the food so much, and especially that you were so impressed with the Chicken Yassa – it's a real pleasure to read your comments!
You are absolutely right about the unavailable dishes, and we thank you for your understanding. We are currently working on improving this to offer an even smoother and more complete experience in the future.
We look forward to welcoming you back very soon to share more delicious flavors with you!
Thank you again for your kind words and your near-perfect rating.

The Rio Fresco Team
reviews.name: David De Castro (Dabok)

reviews.textTranslated:
Just wow! The atmosphere is relaxed and laid-back. The staff is welcoming and friendly, with a great sense of humor and a cheerful disposition.

The café is charming, and the food was equally impressive! The refined decor is ideal for a coffee break, an aperitif, or a romantic dinner. A beautiful oasis in the heart of Pâquis-Centre, Rio Fresco, a blend of garden and elegance, adds a touch of brightness.
The service and cocktails live up to expectations (and the price). It's the perfect place to meet wonderful people. If you're in Geneva, don't miss it!
reviews.text:
Just waaaaaaw ambiance décontractée et relaxante. Personnel accueillant et chaleureux à la bonne humeur et au sens de l'humour.
Le café est charmant tout comme la cuisine qui n'était pas en reste! Le décor raffiné est idéal pour une pause café, un apéro, un dîner en tête à tête.Très beau oasis au cœur du Pâquis-Centre, le Rio Fresco entre jardin et élégance donne une touche de lumière
Le service et les cocktails sont à la hauteur des attentes (et du prix). Endroit parfait pour faire des rencontres formidables. Si vous êtes à Genève, ne vous le faites pas raconter.
reviews.responseFromOwnerText: Thank you so much for this exceptional feedback! We are delighted that you were captivated by the ambiance, service, and cuisine. Your description of Rio Fresco touches us deeply and perfectly reflects the experience we strive to offer. We look forward to welcoming you back for more unforgettable moments!
reviews.name: Awa Gomis

reviews.textTranslated:

I recommend it.

Vibe is cool and unpretentious.
reviews.name: Andre Russ

reviews.text:
An incredible unique experience to remember and absolutely worth the money, because the cocktails are the same prices as other bars in Geneva but have so much more value. Each drink has it’s own character, whether it’s a hot drink set on fire or a cold drink held by a glass made entirely of ice.

We sat at the bar and spoke to the bartenders Christophe and Harry - both are incredibly friendly, we spoke for hours and were told many interesting stories about the history of the cocktails and the bar itself. One in which is that Christophe set up the first true cocktail bar in Geneva: L’Atelier. So this cocktail bar is run by Geneva’s finest and most experienced cocktail makers.

Without a doubt I can say this will be our go-to bar from now on.
reviews.name: Rory Burke

reviews.text:
Living in the heart of Geneva has many upsides and this restaurant is one of them. Their menu is rich in coffee and tea options but the pièce de résistance has to be their impeccable version of 𰻝𰻝面. Thick, chewy and oily noodles just like the ones you could get in Shaanxi or Szechuan. Hand made to perfection, these noodles have the salty and spicy charm that goes so well with their particular texture and shape. Each bite fills the mouth with flavours that feel like a one way trip to West China. The tofu pieces are a bit big and hard to chew so next time I'll go with the pork.

If you are into pugaimian or any other thick hand-pulled noodles, their biángbiángmiàn will surely hit the spot. Spice levels are low, so make sure to ask for extra chilli if you need that málà kick.

The chef and the waitress are both charming and welcoming. They are also the same person, so make sure to leave a tip.

reviews.text:
I recently visited this shisha bar in Geneva, and I can’t recommend it enough! The shisha is absolutely top-notch—smooth, flavorful, and perfectly prepared. Each puff was a delight, making it one of the best I’ve had.

The service was equally impressive. The staff was friendly, knowledgeable, and attentive, ensuring our experience was nothing short of excellent. They offered great recommendations and made us feel right at home.

The atmosphere is cozy and inviting, perfect for relaxing with friends or enjoying a quiet evening. If you’re in Geneva, this shisha bar is a must-visit. I’ll definitely be back for more!

I tried the “house cigar” and that was an incredible smoke experience.
